---
title: "Research Projects"
subtitle: "Current and Past Research Projects"
page-layout: full
listing:
- id: projects
  sort: "started desc"
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, subtitle, description, started, ended]
  grid-item-align: left
  field-display-names:
      title: "Project Title"
      author: "Collaborators"
      subtitle: "Funding Source"
      started: "Start Year"
      ended: "End Year"
  contents:
    - projects.yml
---

## Research Projects

This page lists current and past research projects related to software visualization, data mining, and interactive graphics.

:::{#projects}
:::

---

## Research Areas

My research projects focus on:

### Software Visualization
- Visualizing software architecture in 3D environments
- Understanding software dependencies and evolution
- Tools for software comprehension and analysis

### Graph Algorithms and Visualization
- Developing efficient graph layout algorithms
- Edge bundling techniques for complex networks
- Interactive graph exploration tools

### Augmented Reality & 3D Graphics
- Photorealistic data visualization in AR
- Real-time rendering techniques
- Integration of virtual and physical environments

### Visual Data Mining
- Interactive data exploration interfaces
- Pattern discovery in complex datasets
- Visual analytics for large-scale data

---

## Collaboration Opportunities

I am interested in collaborating on projects involving:
- Software engineering tools and visualization
- Data visualization and visual analytics
- 3D graphics and augmented reality applications
- Graph algorithms and network visualization

For collaboration inquiries, please [contact me](contact.qmd).
